category_sources: Official GitLab project is under sequoia-pgp for sequoia-sqv.
source_facts.description says it is a simple OpenPGP signature verification program.
display_name_sources: Official GitLab project name is sequoia-sqv.
docs_sources: Official GitLab README is the best official documentation surface found for sqv.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://gitlab.com/sequoia-pgp/sequoia-sqv; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
